summary: Architected and optimized scalable REST APIs using Python, Flask, and FastAPI for a multi tenant SaaS platform serving 2,000+ users, reducing API response times by 25–30% through asynchronous processing and query optimization.
Designed an AI powered data processing platform that asynchronously generates dimensional data models fromCSV/Excel datasets using LLM integrations.

Partnered with Product Managers and cross functional teams to transform business requirements into scalable technical solutions by defining architecture, epics, user stories, estimates and sprint plans.
Leading the design of a Saga based orchestration framework to eliminate partial deployments by coordinating distributed transactions across independently owned services using compensating actions.
Introduced Test-Driven Development (TDD), increasing automated test coverage to 80%+ and improving overall code quality.
Mentored 4+ engineers through architecture reviews, code reviews and technical guidance.
Designed and developed REST APIs and authentication services using Python, Oracle, and Docker for enterprise hospitality integrations.
Architected and led the development of a new Sabre integration service, enabling interoperability between Amadeus and external hospitality platforms through secure REST based communication.
Improved software quality by increasing automated test coverage and reducing production defects through comprehensive testing and code reviews.
Served as Acting Scrum Master, facilitating sprint planning, story estimation and retrospectives.
Mentored 3+ engineers through technical guidance, code reviews and knowledge sharing.
Transitioned from SAP consulting to backend software engineering within one year, developing automation solutions using Python and Java.
Developed a report comparison tool to validate report structures across environments, improving consistency and reducing manual verification effort.
Automated operational reporting workflows using Python, Selenium, and OpenPyXL, reducing manual effort by over 90
Optimized data reconciliation across multiple enterprise databases to identify inconsistencies and improve reporting, accuracy.
